title: justicia ciliata
intro: Justicia ciliata, also known as the hairy justicia or hairy snoutwort, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Justicia ciliata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Justicia ciliata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, and it can also be dried and powdered for use in capsules or as a topical cream.
